📥 How to get the update: (6/6)

Go to Settings > System > System updates > Download and Install.

Updates are rolling out gradually, so it might take a minute.

🔧 More features and fixes: (5/6)

🔐 Privacy Space: Swipe right in app drawer.
🔑 Separate passwords for App Locker and Privacy Space.
📶 Hotspot Manager: See who’s connected.
🛡️ April Android security patch.
🐞 General stability improvements.

✨ Welcome to Nothing X 3.0: (4/6)

A fresh new UI — more immersive, more fluid.
🎧 Support for Buds 2.
🛠️ General bug fixes and polish. https://t.co/iKKSfStN95

More camera upgrades: (3/6)

🤳 Better selfies with improved skin detail + colour balance.
🌃 Clearer night shots under streetlights.
🎨 Filters now on 50MP images.
🔍 Brighter telephoto low-light captures.
✨ Less flicker in slow-mo and zoom footage.

Shoot in 4K, from every angle: (2/6)

You can now record in 4K 30FPS using the telephoto and periscope cameras.

Zoom to 2x — Phone (3a) switches to the telephoto lens.
Go to 3x — Phone (3a) Pro kicks in with the periscope lens. https://t.co/t1JofbC9vR
